name: uBurst
description: 8HP micro clone of Mutable Instruments Clouds running Parasites firmware. Four modes: Granular, Pitch Shifter/Reverb, Looping Delay, and Spectral processing.

controls.name: Position
controls.description: Selects playback position within the buffer. CV controllable.
controls.detail: CCW: buffer start · CW: buffer end · CV input for modulation

controls.name: Size
controls.description: Grain or window size. Larger values produce longer, smoother grains.
controls.detail: CCW: short grains · CW: long grains · CV controllable

controls.name: Pitch
controls.description: Grain transposition. Center = unity pitch. V/Oct tracking via V/Oct input.
controls.detail: Center: no pitch shift · CV via V/Oct input

controls.name: Density
controls.description: Grain density and triggering rate. Controls how many grains are generated per second.
controls.detail: CCW: sparse · CW: dense · negative values: reverse grains

controls.name: Texture
controls.description: Grain window shape and overlap. Shapes spectral texture from smooth to grainy.
controls.detail: CCW: smooth/sine window · CW: harsh/square window · CV controllable

controls.name: Blend
controls.description: Wet/dry mix between dry input signal and processed granular output.
controls.detail: CCW: fully dry · CW: fully wet

controls.name: Freeze
controls.description: Button that freezes the audio buffer, looping captured audio indefinitely.
controls.detail: Press: freeze · Release: resume recording · also triggerable via gate input

inputs.name: Left In
inputs.description: Left (mono) audio input. Normalled to Right input when Right is unpatched.

inputs.name: Right In
inputs.description: Right audio input for stereo operation.

inputs.name: Trigger
inputs.description: Triggers a single grain burst or freeze toggle depending on mode.

inputs.name: V/Oct
inputs.description: 1V/oct pitch input for transposition of grains relative to Pitch knob.

inputs.name: Position CV
inputs.description: CV modulates playback Position in the buffer.

behaviors.name: Granular Mode
behaviors.description: Default mode. Records incoming audio into a buffer and reads it back as overlapping grains. Position, Size, Density, and Texture all affect granular playback.

behaviors.name: Pitch Shifter / Reverb Mode (Parasites)
behaviors.description: Uses grain engine for pitch shifting and reverb-like diffusion. Pitch knob shifts without affecting speed. Long Size and high Density creates lush reverb tails.

behaviors.name: Looping Delay Mode (Parasites)
behaviors.description: Transforms module into a looping delay with granular characteristics. Position sets delay tap, Density controls feedback.

behaviors.name: Spectral Mode (Parasites)
behaviors.description: FFT-based spectral processing. Freezes and manipulates frequency content. Position scrubs spectral frames; Texture blurs frequency bins.

behaviors.name: Freeze
behaviors.description: Halts buffer recording, looping the captured audio. All grain parameters continue to modulate playback of the frozen buffer.

patchIdeas.name: Spectral freeze drone
patchIdeas.patch: Audio in · Freeze button held · Position + Size sweep frozen buffer · Blend full wet · infinite evolving drone

patchIdeas.name: Pitched reverb
patchIdeas.patch: Mode: Pitch Shifter/Reverb · Density low · Size medium · Blend 70% wet · shimmer wash

patchIdeas.name: Granular stutter
patchIdeas.patch: Mode: Granular · Density high · Size very small · Trigger input from clock · rhythmic micro-slice effect

patchIdeas.name: Looping delay with degradation
patchIdeas.patch: Mode: Looping Delay · Density = feedback · Texture = filter · Size = delay time · self-degrading loops
